file_hashes: SHA-256 over raw file bytes for each path listed in integrity/hashes.sha256, excluding integrity/hashes.sha256 itself.
zip_hash: SHA-256 over final ZIP bytes; stored as sidecar .zip.sha256 outside the archive.
active_rules_canonical: SHA-256 over UTF-8 bytes of integrity/active_rules_canonical.txt. Canonical line format is owner|id|title|formulation in active_rules.csv order.
render_check: All unique PDF hashes rendered by Poppler pdftoppm at 72 dpi after generation; duplicate PDFs verified by identical SHA-256.
qa_boundary: QA-A/B/C/D only; QA-E field effectiveness is not claimed.
